tei:respStmt.tei:persName: Timothy L. Jackson, ed. Kurt Oppel

sdo:itemDesc.dc:title: Handwritten letter from Oppel to Schenker, dated September 23, 1928
sdo:itemDesc.dc:description: Oppel reports that Wilhelm Furtwängler intends to establish a music conservatory in Berlin; he looks forward to coming to Vienna in the autumn.

tei:opener.tei:salute: Mein lieber Herr Professor Schenker,Receipt of this letter is recorded in Schenker’s diary for September 25, 1928: “Von Oppel (Br.): viele Bildchen u. Dank für die Adressen; erzählt, daß in Berlin eine Musik-Hochschule unter Furtwängler im Entstehen sei” (“From Oppel (letter): many pictures, and thanks for the addresses; he says that a music Hochschule under Furtwängler's direction is being founded in Berlin”). — The photographs are not preserved with this letter. (Seven photographs of Oppel, his wife Gertrud, and children are catalogued as OJ 72/11, but the dates of none of them correspond with those enclosed.)

tei:div.tei:p: heissen Dank für die drei Karten,Writing of a postcard to Oppel is recorded in Schenker’s diary for September 5, 1928: “An Oppel (K.): werde den Adressen von Pollak u. Weißgärber nachgehen” (“To Oppel (postcard): I shall find out the addresses of Pollak and Weißgärber”). Schenker later wrote to Robert Pollak, first violinist of the Buxbaum Quartet, who agreed that they would play Oppel’s latest string quartet. The diary for October 6 records: “Von Weisgärber (Br.): pflichtet meinem Urteil über den Wert des Oppel-Quartetts bei (!!), muß aber aus materiellen Gründen andere Stücke vorziehen.” (“From Weisgärber (letter): he endorses my judgment of the worth of Oppel's Quartet (!!) but is obliged to favor other pieces, on financial grounds.”). — A letter from Weissgärber to Schenker from 1928 preserved as OJ 15/17, [1] is likely to be this item. die Adressen und Ihre liebe Anerkennung! Hier schicken Ulrich u. Walter ein paar Bilder. Ich bin seit 10. wieder in Leipzig, 100 neue Schüler, aber schlechtes Material. In Berlin soll unter Direction Furtwänglers eine neue Hochschule für Musik steigen. Er gibt aber wohl nur den Namen dazu her. Die Jungen sind wohl. Ich freue mich auf Wien im Oct. Die Arbeit in L. macht vorläufig wenig Freude, da Pauer keine Ahnung von Organisation hat. Für heute

Warmest thanks for your three postcards, the addresses, and your kind recognition. Ulrich and Walter are sending you a few photographs with this. I have been again in Leipzig since the 10th: 100 new pupils, but of poor quality. In Berlin, a new music conservatory under Furtwängler’s direction is to be established. He is probably merely lending his name to it. The boys are well. I am looking forward to Vienna in October. The work in Leipzig gives me little joy at present, as Pauer has no idea about organization. For today,

tei:closer.tei:salute: the most cordial greetings to the two of you
